title: rosa × alba var. cymbifolia
intro: Rosa × alba var. cymbifolia, also known as the white rose or Rosa cymbifolia, is a variety of the hybrid rose species Rosa × alba, which is a cross between Rosa gallica and Rosa rubiginosa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce swelling, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Rosa × alba var. cymbifolia include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation and better sleep. Herbal preparations of Rosa × alba var. cymbifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
